title: pilosella bauhini subsp. pseudobauhini
intro: Pilosella bauhini subsp. pseudobauhini, also known as Pseudobauhinia, is a rare and lesser-known plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Pilosella bauhini subsp. pseudobauhini can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
